speech:
I'll help you connect with our support team! 📞

**Contact Options:**
• 📧 Email: support@vehicleverse.com
• 📞 Phone: +91-XXXXXXXXXX
• 💬 Raise a complaint from your Dashboard

**Response Times:**
• Email: Within 24 hours
• Phone: 9 AM - 6 PM (Mon-Sat)
• Emergency: 24/7 hotline available

You can also file a formal complaint through the 'My Complaints' section in your dashboard.
